title: CO-001 Unforeseen Obstruction - Timber Caisson Wall 111th St
description: TBM encountered unexpected buried timber caisson wall foundation at 111th Street station cavern location. Wall dates to 1912 Burnham Plan construction. Not identified on utility survey or historical drawings. Required TBM interventions to cut and remove timber obstruction. 3 TBM interventions under compressed air per OSHA 29 CFR 1926 Subpart S. Decompression schedule adds time.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

title: CO-002 NICOR Gas Main Reroute - TBM Alignment Conflict
description: NICOR 8-inch high-pressure gas main as-built location conflicts with TBM bore alignment at 115th Street. Survey showed main at 42-foot depth per utility record. Field potholing confirmed actual depth at 38 feet - directly in TBM path. NICOR required full main reroute. 6-week utility window. Temporary gas service to 480 affected customers during reroute.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

title: CO-003 Illinois EPA Groundwater Monitoring Expansion
description: Illinois EPA required expansion of groundwater monitoring network from 12 to 28 monitoring points after project-adjacent property owner (industrial site) filed petition citing concern over aquifer drawdown. IEPA Order 24-0882. Added 16 monitoring wells with automatic telemetry and bi-weekly reporting.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

title: CO-004 Shotcrete Lining Upgrade at 119th St Cavern
description: Geotechnical investigation during shaft excavation at 119th Street revealed soil conditions inconsistent with design baseline. Clay plasticity index higher than geotech baseline (PI=42 vs. design PI=28). HNTB Engineer of Record required upgrade from 12-inch to 18-inch initial shotcrete lining with additional fiber reinforcement per revised NATM design.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel
